# zstack_global_config (Resource)

Manages a ZStack Global Config resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `category` (String) The category of the global config (acts as part of the ID).
- `name` (String) The name of the global config (acts as part of the ID).
- `value` (String) The value to set for this config.

### Read-Only

- `default_value` (String) The default value of the config.
- `description` (String) The description of the config.
